description: DVGA README scenario themes mapped to graphqlai report artifacts. manualVerdict uses: expected | noise | miss-tool | miss-target.

replaySession.method: Parsed replayCurl bodies from sourceReport and POSTed via scripts/replay-checklist-from-report.mjs (tokens not stored here).

comparison.interpretation: Ballpark match for a lab regression: finding-title mix stayed similar (sensitive-pattern + timeouts + one JWT-ish signal). Extra HTTP rows are primarily handle-replay follow-ups, which depend on IDs returned during the run.

beforeCodeChangeWorkflow: Copy introspection + scope from the pinned baseline run (see docs/REGRESSION.md).
Create validation/dvga/runs/<YYYYMMDD-HHmmss>/ and run the canonical command from docs/DVGA-VALIDATION.md.
Compare results[] family histogram + findings[] title histogram to 20260421-161136 / 20260421-170949 (scripts/summarize-graphqlai-report.mjs).
Optional: replay one curl per theme (scripts/replay-checklist-from-report.mjs) after DVGA is up.

rows.dvgaTheme: Denial of Service — Batch Query Attack

replayEvidence.summary: Batch/array POST returned GraphQL errors including Python resolver error text and a second-operation parse error — noisy, intentional DVGA-style failure surface.

rows.notes: GRAPHQL_BATCH_ALIAS probe exercised; replay confirms server returns rich error text (training data for triage, not a severity score).

rows.dvgaTheme: Denial of Service — Deep Recursion Query Attack

replayEvidence.summary: Valid GraphQL response envelope; depth ladder probe succeeded without server error for this depth step.

rows.notes: Correlate deeper ladder steps in report rows if DVGA recursion lab requires higher depth.

replayEvidence.summary: Validated from sourceReport observationLog + surfaceSummary (no HTTP replay required for this row).

rows.notes: Confirms graphqlai consumed introspection JSON for compilation — prerequisite for schema-driven fuzzing.

graphqlai.findingTitle: Looks like bearer/JWT material in body

replayEvidence.summary: login returned accessToken and refreshToken fields (JWT-shaped); redact in external shares.

rows.notes: Matches bounty-signals jwt_or_bearer_leak intent on DVGA login flow.

replayEvidence.summary: GraphQL errors array contained SQLAlchemy/sqlite UNIQUE constraint / SQL INSERT text — strong disclosure signal for lab triage.

rows.notes: Heuristic 'sensitive pattern' aligns with echoed SQL-ish error material (DVGA injection lessons).

rows.dvgaTheme: Denial of Service — slow path / resource intensive (timeout signal)

replayEvidence.summary: Single-threaded replay completed (~55s) with success body under DVGA stress fuzz run may still abort under parallel budget — both can be true.

rows.notes: Treat Transport/timeout findings as saturation signals during campaigns; single-curl replay is not always slow.
